title: [New research] AI Search & LinkedIn: 5 Takeaways from 9.5 Million Citations
author: Chris Hackney
notes: Summarizes Meltwater research on LinkedIn citations in AI search across six major models.

title: How LinkedIn Content Wins in AI Search
author: Meltwater and LinkedIn
notes: Methodology says Meltwater GenAI Lens analyzed 9.5 million AI citations across 16 B2B categories and six models.

title: How to Grow Your AI Search Visibility With LinkedIn Content
author: Margarita Loktionova
notes: Reports Semrush analysis of 89,000 unique LinkedIn URLs cited by ChatGPT Search, Google AI Mode, and Perplexity.

title: AI Features and Your Website
author: Google
notes: Explains AI Overviews, AI Mode, relevant links, and query fan-out from a site owner's perspective.

title: Google's Guide to Optimizing for Generative AI Features on Google Search
author: Google
notes: States that foundational SEO best practices remain relevant and that crawlable, unique, expert-led content matters for generative AI search visibility.

title: Why AI Search Results Are Ghosting Your LinkedIn Posts
author: Dave Maney
notes: Useful caution that standard LinkedIn posts may lack source reputation, citation network, coherence, and depth signals.

title: Keeping conversations real on LinkedIn
author: LinkedIn Corporate Communications
notes: States that LinkedIn is taking steps against generic AI content and content with little human perspective.

title: How AI and social media are shaping B2B authenticity and visibility
author: Oktopost
notes: Context source for multi-surface AI visibility framing. Do not use for statistics or material performance claims.

title: What Is Employee-Generated Content?
author: Jeffery Schroeder
notes: Internal link for the employee-generated content operating model.

title: Employee-Generated Content vs. Employee Advocacy
author: Jeffery Schroeder
notes: Internal link for the distinction between original employee expertise and amplification programs.
